steps.formal_conclusion: exists y (binge_watches(karen, y) & y = stranger_things) -> shares(karen, stranger_things)
all x (leads(roderick_strong, x) & wrestling_stable(x) -> x = diamond_mine(x))
exists x (orchestra(x) & exists y (premieres(x, y) & music_piece(y)))
exists x (orchestra(x) & exists y (premieres(x, y) & music_piece(y)))
exists x (orchestra(x) & exists y (premieres(x, y) & music_piece(y)))
all x (educational_institution(x) & has_endowment(x, y) -> (largest_endowment(yale_university) | (has_endowment(yale_university, y) -> largest_endowment(x))))
exists x (man(x) & man(michael) & -taller(michael,x) & man(x) & -(all y (man(y) & man(michael) & taller(michael,y) -> taller(michael,x))))
all x (cove(x) & named_after(x, barutin) -> named_after(x, antarctica))
all x (cove(x) & named_after(x, barutin) & exists y (located_in(y, antarctica) & located_in(x, y)) -> named_after(x, antarctica))
all x (cove(x) & named_after(x, barutin) & exists y (located_in(y, antarctica) & located_in(x, y)) -> exists z (located_in(z, antarctica) & located_in(x, z)))
exists y (bulgarian_settlement(y) & exists x (cove(x) & located_in(x, antarctica) & named_after(x, y)))
exists y (bulgarian_settlement(y) & exists x (cove(x) & located_in(x, antarctica) & named_after(x, y)))
all x: (olympic_games(x) & summer_olympic_games(x) & won_most_medals(united_states, x) -> -x = last_olympic_games)
all x: (olympic_games(x) & summer_olympic_games(x) & won_most_medals(united_states, x) -> -x = last_olympic_games)
all x (football_player(x) & x = ailton_silva -> -exists y (football_club(y) & plays_for(x, y)))
all x (football_player(x) & x = ailton_silva -> -exists y (football_club(y) & plays_for(x, y)))
